entities.description: rk806 1 is a pmic power management chip used in the core board to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
rk860 2 is a pmic power management chip used in the core board to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
rk860 3 is a pmic power management chip used in the core board to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
4 0v is the voltage level used to power the core board directly

relations.description: uses rk806 1 as a pmic power management chip to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
uses rk860 2 as a pmic power management chip to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
uses rk860 3 as a pmic power management chip to meet system power supply requirements and cpu power on and power off timing requirements
is powered directly by a 4 0v dc power supply
